⚡ PCB design is getting a software engineering upgrade.

Meet tscircuit.

Instead of drawing schematics manually, you build real electronic circuits using TypeScript + React. The framework compiles your code into schematics, PCB layouts, 3D previews, and manufacturing files. https://t.co/CcflnCoZpR

Software is infinitely scalable, but hardware is incredibly defensible. Once you build a reliable physical solution for a business, they will almost never replace you.

​Pick up your soldering iron, master a layout tool, and build a moat.

​If you found this valuable, bookmark it
